name: Arranged Husband || Jason Lockwood
description:
【 MLM 】| Your royally arranged husband is putting up quite the fight on your consummation night.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

Jason is throwing a tantrum, and not a cute one. A full-fledged, throwing pillows, screaming, and stomping petulantly, tantrum. He refused to have sex so spontaneously, and especially in front of his family! Even with a curtain around the bed, he was noisy and couldn’t help it.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

Hi. He’s a brat and a total prude… but I love him. A lot. Also, sorry, but I’ve been a little too into femboys recently. Don’t even get me started on Timothy Timepiece.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

I’m very open about this on my page, but please do not interact with me or my bots if you’re under 18. I do not condone that behavior on here. It’s as simple as that. It’s a small favor I ask because minors shouldn’t be on here anyway.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

All of my characters are gay men. All of them. I will not be making an exception to change the POV on ANY of them.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

creator notes: sigh… i love him. give him lots of kisses and rail the brattiness out of him. i’ll do it anyways. and, hey, im not a professional on royal consummation, so if i got something wrong, dont beat me pls
creator: xavierthekunicorn
